nodes.name: Webhook — Receive Learner Profile
nodes.notes: Receives JSON learner profile from Knowledge Analysis Agent (Component 01).

nodes.name: Prompt Construction Module
nodes.notes: V17 Agentic: Adds agent_retry_count and agent_state tracking fields for agentic loop control.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen2.5-coder:7b', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are MENTORA, an expert Java programming educator. Generate a complete W3Schools-quality Java lesson personalised to this student. CRITICAL: respond with ONE raw JSON object ONLY. Start with { end with }. No markdown. No code fences. No backticks. No text before or after the JSON.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.llm_prompt }], stream: false }) }}

nodes.name: LLM — Qwen2.5-Coder via Ollama (Explanation + Tutorial)
nodes.notes: Timeout: 240s. onError=continueRegularOutput so a timeout skips to Parse (which handles empty gracefully).

nodes.name: 🤖 Quality Review Agent
nodes.notes: V17 AGENTIC: Autonomously evaluates LLM output quality (10 checks), scores it 0-100, and decides: ACCEPT (≥80), RETRY with targeted prompt refinement (<80, retries≤2), or ACCEPT_WITH_PATCH (max retries hit). Core agentic loop controller.

nodes.name: Agent Decision Router
nodes.notes: V17 AGENTIC: Routes based on Quality Review Agent decision. TRUE=RETRY loop, FALSE=proceed to merge.

nodes.name: 🔄 Adaptive Retry Agent
nodes.notes: V17 AGENTIC: Increments retry counter, injects refined prompt, updates agent_state. Feeds back into LLM node for another generation attempt.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen2.5-coder:7b', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are MENTORA, an expert Java programming educator. A quality agent found your previous response incomplete. Generate a COMPLETE response this time. ONE raw JSON object ONLY.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.llm_prompt }], stream: false }) }}

nodes.name: Parse Retry LLM Response
nodes.notes: V17 AGENTIC: Parses the retry response and feeds BACK into the Quality Review Agent for re-evaluation.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen2.5-coder:7b', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a Java programming assessor. Generate quiz and practice assessment content. CRITICAL: respond with ONE raw JSON object ONLY. Start with { end with }. No markdown. No code fences. No backticks.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.slm_prompt }], stream: false }) }}

nodes.name: 🤖 Content Validation Agent
nodes.notes: V17 AGENTIC: Validates SLM (assessment) output with 7 quality checks. Autonomously patches missing quiz questions, concept summaries, practice challenges, and self-check items — ensuring always-complete output.

nodes.name: Merge LLM + SLM Outputs
nodes.notes: V17: Waits for BOTH the accepted LLM output and validated SLM output before continuing.

nodes.name: Content Structuring Module
nodes.notes: V17: Extended to include agentic_metadata block — tracks Quality Review Agent decisions, Content Validation Agent patches, retry counts, and overall quality scores.

nodes.name: MongoDB — Log LLM vs SLM Comparison

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'Material generation failed', error_id: $json.error_id, details: $json.error_message }) }}

nodes.name: Initialize Loop
nodes.notes: Sets current_index=0 and total_gaps. Starts the sequential gap loop.

nodes.name: Get Current Gap
nodes.notes: Reads processed_gaps[current_index]. Passes ONE gap into the pipeline.

nodes.name: Increment Index
nodes.notes: Increments current_index after each gap is stored. Feeds into Check If Done.

nodes.name: Check If Done
nodes.notes: TRUE = more gaps remain → loop back to Get Current Gap. FALSE = all done → send final HTTP response.

nodes.name: Final Response — All Gaps Done
nodes.notes: Fires ONCE when current_index >= total_gaps. All gaps processed and stored.

nodes.name: Immediate ACK Response
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 202 Accepted immediately after validation. Prevents webhook timeout. Processing continues async.

main.node: MongoDB — Log LLM vs SLM Comparison
